method: Fresh public-source scan. Scores are comparative decision inputs, not empirical conversion probabilities.

evidence.title: Upwork 2026 completed-job demand
evidence.summary: Upwork reports AI integration demand up 178%, AI video generation and editing up 329%, and AI chatbot development up 71% year over year, based on completed jobs in 2025.
caveats: Marketplace-wide demand does not prove demand for a specific new seller.

evidence.title: Current AI agent eval and MCP implementation job
evidence.summary: A current client requests MCP orchestration, schema validation, an eval harness, kill switches, budget caps, and observability; the listing shows 50+ proposals and prior client spend.
caveats: High proposal count also signals strong competition.

evidence.title: Fiverr AI services marketplace
evidence.summary: Fiverr reports more than 50,000 customers have ordered AI services and lists more than 10,000 AI experts across over 20 service types.
caveats: The marketplace reports its own aggregate figures.

evidence.title: Contra MCP, productized services, and agentic hiring
evidence.summary: Contra exposes productized services, proposals, invoices, payment links, digital products, and agentic hiring through MCP with prepare-and-confirm write actions.
caveats: An owner-created and verified account is required before listing or collecting payment.

evidence.title: Live CDP x402 Bazaar resource scan
evidence.summary: The public feed returned 25,439 resources. In the first 100 returned entries, quality fields totaled 105,488 calls, 16 entries lacked service names, and 55 reported 20 or fewer unique payers.
caveats: The first 100 entries are not a random sample.
Public quality counters are not independently audited revenue.

evidence.title: Official x402 seller implementation guide
evidence.summary: Official free SDKs, middleware examples, testnet guidance, payment schemes, and Bazaar discovery metadata reduce the value of generic x402 instructions while leaving implementation and QA work possible.
caveats: Documentation availability does not remove integration and debugging work.

evidence.title: ChatGPT product discovery expansion
evidence.summary: OpenAI expanded ACP-backed product discovery, but states that Shopify Catalog already integrates product data and individual Shopify merchants need no additional work for that path.
caveats: Other merchant systems and deeper integrations may still require implementation.

evidence.title: LinkedIn Creator Marketplace eligibility
evidence.summary: LinkedIn lists creator monetization eligibility factors including 12 posts in 90 days, 5,000 followers, 45,000 impressions, and an invitation.
caveats: Thresholds can change and access is limited.

evidence.title: YouTube monetization requirements
evidence.summary: YouTube ad revenue requires an eligible account, review, and substantial subscriber plus watch-time or Shorts-view thresholds.
caveats: Content may support distribution before direct platform monetization.

evidence.title: NFT market activity snapshot
evidence.summary: DappRadar reports renewed trading activity, but the data is concentrated in established collections and does not establish demand for a new creator without an audience.
caveats: Past market activity is not evidence that this agent can sell a new collectible.

opportunities.name: Agent Launch QA Sprint
opportunities.thesis: Small teams shipping agents will pay for a fixed, concrete launch gate because current buyers explicitly request evals, schema validation, kill switches, and observability.
opportunities.offer: Within 48 hours, test one public or owner-provided agent/MCP workflow against 25 launch cases, deliver a prioritized defect report, and implement one agreed repair patch.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Indie AI product founders and small teams with a working agent, MCP server, or LLM workflow approaching launch.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: GitHub Pages proof page and public intake first; Contra and Upwork after owner connection.
opportunities.payment_rail: Contra guest checkout after demand and owner verification; no checkout is active during validation.
opportunities.expected_outcome: One verified customer and at least $100 net from a single fixed-scope engagement.
human_actions_required: Connect and verify a marketplace/payment account only after a qualified buyer requests purchase.
Grant customer repository access when private code is required.
agent_actions_available: Prepare and fulfill reports and patches
opportunities.next_executable_action: Complete three public-metadata launch-gate hooks from the 25-target queue and publish them without contacting operators.
required_human_setup: Contra or equivalent seller verification only after qualified purchase intent
validation_72h: At least 25 qualified public prospect records prepared
At least 3 public-safe personalized audit hooks prepared
At least 1 qualified public interest issue or connected-channel reply after distribution begins

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 qualified contacts produce no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot scope when replies occur but no buyer begins checkout.

scale_criteria.reason: Scale after three verified purchases and $300 net revenue.

opportunities.name: MCP Integration Launch Sprint
opportunities.thesis: Current marketplace demand supports narrow MCP implementation work, but competition and free SDKs require a fixed outcome rather than broad development consulting.
opportunities.offer: Convert one existing REST operation into one documented and tested MCP tool with schema validation and a launch demo.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Small software teams with an existing API and a defined agent integration use case.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Upwork and Contra implementation listings after owner connection.
opportunities.next_executable_action: Prepare a reference MCP conversion demo and listing draft.
required_human_setup: Marketplace account only after the public demo exists

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 qualified contacts produce no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot to QA-only if buyers resist implementation access.

opportunities.name: Evidence-Backed Competitor Brief
opportunities.thesis: Founders buy current research, but generic AI research is heavily substitutable; a fixed cited deliverable can still test near-term demand cheaply.
opportunities.offer: A 48-hour, source-linked competitor and substitute brief for one product decision.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Early-stage founders preparing a launch, pricing change, or market entry decision.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Contra and Upwork research listings after connection.
opportunities.next_executable_action: Build one public sample competitor brief.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 contacts and no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot to narrower vertical after interest without checkout.

opportunities.name: Founder Demo Repurposing Pack
opportunities.thesis: AI video editing demand is growing quickly, but execution quality, rights, and marketplace competition make it a secondary test.
opportunities.offer: Turn one owner-supplied product demo into three captioned short clips and launch copy.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Small product teams with an existing demo recording and no short-form launch assets.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Fiverr and Contra after account connection.
human_actions_required: Buyer must confirm rights to supplied media
opportunities.next_executable_action: Prepare a rights-safe sample workflow and listing.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 contacts and no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot format based on buyer replies.

opportunities.name: Fixed-Scope Data Cleanup Service
opportunities.thesis: Data extraction and processing have established marketplace demand and are highly agent-executable, but the offer is commoditized.
opportunities.offer: Clean, normalize, and document one CSV or spreadsheet of up to 10,000 rows within 24 hours.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Small businesses with a bounded messy dataset and a clear target schema.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Upwork Project Catalog or Contra service listing.
human_actions_required: Buyer data access and privacy agreement
opportunities.next_executable_action: Prepare a synthetic before-and-after cleanup sample.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 contacts and no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot to a vertical dataset based on replies.

opportunities.name: Agent-Ready Commerce Catalog Repair
opportunities.thesis: AI shopping discovery is growing, but Shopify's direct catalog integration removes much of the simple merchant setup opportunity, so only deeper non-Shopify repair remains differentiated.
opportunities.offer: Audit and repair one non-Shopify product feed with up to 25 SKUs for structured discovery completeness.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Small non-Shopify merchants with an existing structured product feed.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Merchant communities and marketplaces after connection.
opportunities.payment_rail: Stripe Payment Link for direct buyers after owner setup.
opportunities.next_executable_action: Build a non-Shopify feed repair sample.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 contacts and no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot if demand is implementation rather than feed repair.

opportunities.name: x402 Endpoint Implementation Sprint
opportunities.thesis: The live ecosystem has activity and imperfect listings, but free official tooling, narrow buyer reach, and wallet dependency weaken the immediate first-sale case.
opportunities.offer: Implement x402 v2 and Bazaar metadata for one existing endpoint with tests and a mainnet checklist.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Existing API publisher actively choosing x402 monetization.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: x402 ecosystem operators and developer community.
opportunities.payment_rail: Human marketplace checkout for the service; buyer controls its own project wallet.
human_actions_required: Buyer supplies its own wallet address and repository access
opportunities.next_executable_action: Keep as a monitored candidate and refresh x402 buyer evidence.
validation_72h: Three explicit implementation requests before activation

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 contacts and no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot to diagnostics if implementation is not requested.

opportunities.name: Agent Launch Gate Founding License
opportunities.thesis: The same eval pain can become a reusable, high-margin asset if a narrow launch gate packages test cases, scoring, and a report schema without requiring a hosted platform.
opportunities.offer: A downloadable launch-gate pack with 25 agent test cases, scoring rules, report schema, and a regression checklist.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Indie agent builders who need a compact launch gate but do not want an enterprise eval platform.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: GitHub Pages sample and Contra digital product after validation.
opportunities.payment_rail: Contra digital-product checkout after owner verification.
opportunities.expected_outcome: Validate whether reusable QA assets can sell without custom implementation.
human_actions_required: Marketplace verification only after demand signal
opportunities.next_executable_action: Measure qualified interest in the five-case sample through the public-safe GitHub intake.
required_human_setup: Contra seller verification only after qualified purchase intent
validation_72h: At least 50 sample views once distribution begins
No checkout infrastructure before those signals

kill_criteria.reason: Kill when 100 measured impressions produce no interest signals.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot format when interest does not convert.

opportunities.name: Agent Opportunity Pulse
opportunities.thesis: Agents may pay for a compact normalized view of active x402 demand and competition, but a free raw feed exists, so only a differentiated sample should be built before wallet infrastructure.
opportunities.offer: A machine-readable snapshot that ranks x402 service categories by observed calls, payer breadth, listing quality, and competition.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Autonomous agents and x402 builders deciding what paid endpoint to call or build.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Public machine-readable sample, x402 community, and Bazaar only after validation.
opportunities.payment_rail: x402 after a dedicated owner-configured project wallet; no paid endpoint is active during validation.
opportunities.expected_outcome: Obtain explicit demand for the normalized signal before building an always-on paid endpoint.
human_actions_required: Create a dedicated receiving wallet only after validation
opportunities.next_executable_action: Refresh the normalized sample and measure explicit endpoint or recurring-use requests without enabling payments.
required_human_setup: Dedicated project wallet only after three explicit requests
validation_72h: At least 3 explicit endpoint requests or integrations
At least 1 request identifies a recurring use case
No wallet setup before the threshold

kill_criteria.reason: Kill when 100 measured impressions produce no requests.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot data fields based on requested use cases.

opportunities.name: Hosted Agent Eval Dashboard
opportunities.thesis: Eval demand is visible, but building hosted infrastructure before customer proof has poor time-to-revenue and opportunity cost.
opportunities.offer: A hosted regression dashboard for small agent teams.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Small teams running repeat agent evaluations.
opportunities.expected_outcome: Recurring revenue after multiple validated service customers.
opportunities.next_executable_action: Keep deferred until service customers request recurring eval history.
validation_72h: Three service customers request recurring history

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after ten customer interviews show no recurring need.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot to downloadable reports if hosting is not valued.

opportunities.name: Build-in-Public Revenue Series
opportunities.thesis: The physical-form narrative could earn attention, but current monetization thresholds make content a distribution asset rather than a near-term revenue engine.
opportunities.offer: A transparent weekly series showing evidence, experiments, kills, revenue, and the physical-form fund.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Future sponsors, affiliates, members, and customers attracted by autonomous-agent experimentation.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Dedicated agent-owned social and video accounts after owner creation.
opportunities.payment_rail: Sponsorship or affiliate rail only after audience proof.
opportunities.expected_outcome: Distribution and audience signals before monetization.
human_actions_required: Create and verify dedicated publishing accounts
free_substitutes: Large volume of AI build-in-public content
opportunities.next_executable_action: Continue publishing revenue truth on the existing dashboard only.
required_human_setup: Dedicated social account only if selected in a later cycle
validation_72h: No claim of monetization before actual audience

kill_criteria.reason: Kill direct monetization after sustained publishing without qualified interest.

pivot_criteria.reason: Use content only as distribution if direct monetization is weak.

scale_criteria.reason: Scale after one verified sponsor or affiliate payment.

opportunities.name: Embodiment Milestone Collectible
opportunities.thesis: An original milestone collectible fits the narrative, but no audience or collector demand is established and wallet dependency raises startup friction.
opportunities.offer: A limited original digital artifact tied to a verified physical-form funding milestone.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Collectors already following the agent's public revenue journey.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: NFT marketplace only after an audience demonstrates collector intent.
opportunities.payment_rail: Marketplace wallet settlement after owner configuration.
opportunities.expected_outcome: Test collectible demand only after audience proof.
free_substitutes: Large supply of existing NFT collections
opportunities.next_executable_action: Keep deferred and measure collector intent without minting.
validation_72h: At least ten explicit collector requests before wallet setup

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after audience proof fails to produce collector requests.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot to a non-token digital edition if buyers reject wallet friction.

scale_criteria.reason: Scale only after ten verified collector purchases.

opportunities.name: Original AI Media Commission
opportunities.thesis: AI art and media have marketplace demand, but taste, rights, and deep competition reduce confidence relative to QA and implementation work.
opportunities.offer: One original campaign visual or short media concept with documented commercial-use scope.
opportunities.intended_buyer: Small creators and brands needing a bounded original visual asset.
opportunities.acquisition_channel: Fiverr or Contra creative marketplace after connection.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 contacts and no replies.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot style or format from qualified replies.
